g.text: Climb to the hall and hear the plan.
Join the Planners under Route-Warden Cas...
Join the Climbers under Rigger Bel Toma.
Join the Talkers under Advocate Imma Rhe...
Ride the Circle Tram to the junction.
Let Odal lead with the writ.
Ask Odal to hear him out.
Stand by while the crates open.
See the archive onto the barrow.
Walk with him to car nine.
Stand by as the panel falls.
Board and ride for the border.
Trace it at the telegraph office.
Take the blank line to Odal.
Ride the milk train after it.
Pin the reply to the board.
Stake the writ on it now.
Hold for the crews to converge.
Present the writ on three threads.
Follow Toma up the gantry stair.
Walk the aqueduct service way east.
Rig the cradle by the law.
Hold the cradle at the roofline.
Let Odal answer with the writ.
See the crates onto the barrow.
Bring Toma up and stand down.
Step back and flash for help.
Stand by while he tells it.
Wait, then try the vent late.
Drop it and carry the springs.
Hold the light on the last word.
Stand at the gate at dawn.
Rig one anchor to save time.
Find your seats before the whistle.
Take a table in the dining car.
Trade a look with the crew.
Fold and wait for the writ.
Fetch Rhee to set formal terms.
Hold post and send for Rhee.
Slip back and send for Rhee.
Open the door and speak first.
Let the adults take the door.
Hold still and try to calm him.
Give your report at the door.
Match the hands line by line.
Hold the table and log the room.
Count the seals on the cars.
Time it and write it down.
Present the count at the junction.
Watch the quarter hour prove you right.
Ask to check the duplicate book.
Walk with him to car nine.
File the sheet with the writ.
Walk him through what to expect.
Stand with him at the desk.
